title: load_state uses spendable_notes(0) hardcoded — won't load witnesses for other accounts
description: scanner.rs CompactBlockScanner::load_state calls self.store.spendable_notes(0) hardcoded. This is pre-existing (nie-qdlu.4 covers load_state hardcoding account 0), filing to confirm it is known and tracked. The witnesses for any account other than 0 are not loaded into self.witnesses on restart, so those notes will not have their witnesses updated during scanning. Confirms nie-qdlu.4 is the right tracker.
